root.sql: select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as membername , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , trim(sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no ||' '||(CASE sc_mem_m_member_address.mooban WHEN null THEN null ELSE 'หมู่บ้าน'||trim(sc_mem_m_member_address.mooban) END) ||' '|| (CASE sc_mem_m_member_address.moo WHEN null THEN null ELSE trim(sc_mem_m_member_address.moo) END) ||' '||(CASE sc_mem_m_member_address.soi WHEN null THEN null ELSE 'ซอย'||trim(sc_mem_m_member_address.soi) END))as line_1 , (CASE sc_mem_m_member_address.road WHEN null THEN null ELSE 'ถนน'||trim(sc_mem_m_member_address.road) END)||' '|| (CASE sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol WHEN null THEN null ELSE (CASE sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code WHEN '010' THEN 'แขวง'||trim(PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_sub_district_name (sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol)) ELSE 'ตำบล'||trim(PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_sub_district_name (sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol)) END) END)as line_2 , (CASE sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code WHEN null THEN null ELSE (CASE sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code WHEN '010' THEN 'เขต'||trim(PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code,sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code)) ELSE 'อำเภอ'||trim(PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code,sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code)) END)||' '|| (CASE sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code WHEN null THEN null ELSE ((CASE sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code WHEN '010' THEN trim(PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_province_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code)) ELSE 'จังหวัด'||trim(PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_province_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code)) END)) END) ||' '||trim(sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode) END) as line_3 from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_member_address where sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no not between '035701' and '036908' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no not in ('033900') --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth between '02/10/1962' and '01/10/1963' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
